note: Illustrative recorded snapshot for the offline demo. Evidence values are representative of this well-characterized public variant and are labeled as a snapshot, not a live database pull.

variant.inheritance: AD (loss-of-function is an established disease mechanism for BRCA1)

evidence.locator: BRCA1 / hereditary breast and ovarian cancer
evidence.snippet: BRCA1 is a tumor-suppressor gene in which loss of function is a well-established disease mechanism; this duplication causes a frameshift and premature termination.
Very low allele frequency globally; founder-population enrichment noted; no homozygotes observed.
Multiple independent submitters assert Pathogenic with no conflicting interpretations; expert-reviewed.
Reported repeatedly in affected individuals and families with hereditary breast/ovarian cancer.
